positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset, featuring a deep indigo sky gradient blending into burnt orange and gold. The mountain peaks are sharp, stylized, and abstract, composed of interlocking triangular shapes. The foreground includes subtle, scattered geometric elements like abstract constellations and falling stylized 'stars' (small white dots). Clean vector art style, negative space utilization, symmetrical composition, high contrast, centered, designed for screen printing on clothing, flat digital illustration, vibrant yet soothing color palette, ambient light source from behind, ultra-detailed, 8k.
